name: 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP
about: 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP is a type of general medicine used to treat high blood pressure. It contains nebivolol, which blocks certain chemicals in the body to reduce the workload on the heart and blood vessels. This medication comes in the form of tablets with a dosage of 5mg per tablet. The recommended dosage of this medicine should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. It is advised to store this medication in a cool place. Each box contains 10x15 tablets. The origin of this medicine is India.

faq.q: What is the use of 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP is used to treat high blood pressure.

faq.q: What is the dosage of 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: The dosage of 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP is 5mg per tablet.

faq.q: How should I take 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: The recommended dosage of 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.q: What is the packaging quantity of 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP?
faq.a: Each box of 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP contains 10x15 tablets.

faq.q: Where is 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP manufactured?
faq.a: 5 MG Nebivolol Tablets IP is manufactured in India.
